name: Neat

unions.name: IsPadding
unions.comment:
Information about your custom paddings.

  - rem : padding width in units of `rem`

unions.name: NoPadding
unions.comment: Primitive type representing no padding on a view.

unions.name: View
unions.comment: Html alternative that has type level padding.

values.name: div
values.comment: `View` version of `Html.div`.
values.type: List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: empty
values.comment: An alias for `div [] []`.
values.type: Neat.View Neat.NoPadding a

values.name: emptyNode
values.comment: An alias for `\node -> lift node [] []`.
values.type: (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg) -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: expand
values.comment:
Expand padding from `p1` to `p2`.
The width of `p2` is supposed to be greater than `p1`.
values.type: Neat.IsPadding p1 -> Neat.IsPadding p2 -> Neat.View p1 msg -> Neat.View p2 msg

values.name: fromNoPadding
values.type: Neat.IsPadding p -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: keyed
values.type: String.String -> List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List ( String.String, Neat.View p msg ) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: lift
values.type: (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg) -> List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: none
values.comment: View version of `Html.text ""`.
values.type: Neat.View p a

values.name: optimized
values.comment:
v1 : View p msg
    v1 =
        Debug.todo "v1"

    v2 : View p msg
    v2 =
        Debug.todo "v2"

    child : Int -> View p msg
    child _ =
        Debug.todo "child"

    child_ : Int -> Html (Protected p msg)
    child_ =
        toProtected << child

    v : List Int -> View p msg
    v =
        optimized
            String.fromInt
            (lazy child_)
            "div"
            []
values.type: (x -> String.String) -> (x -> Html.Html (Neat.Protected p msg)) -> String.String -> List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List x -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: setAttribute
values.type: Html.Attribute msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: setAttributes
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: setBoundary
values.comment: Set boundary to convert into `NoPadding`.
values.type: Neat.IsPadding p -> Neat.View p msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: setLayout
values.type: Neat.Layout.Internal.Layout msg -> Neat.View p msg -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: setMixin
values.type: Mixin.Mixin msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: setMixins
values.type: List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: text
values.comment: `View` version of `\str -> Html.div [] [ Html.text str ]`.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg

values.name: toPage
values.type: Neat.View Neat.NoPadding msg -> List.List (Html.Html msg)

values.name: toProtected
values.comment:
This is supposed to be used in order to make `Html.Lazy.lazyN` work.
See `optimized` for real usage.
values.type: Neat.View p a -> Html.Html (Neat.Protected p a)

values.name: unsafeFromHtml
values.type: Html.Html msg -> Neat.View p msg

name: Neat.Layout

values.name: column
values.comment: Re-exposing of `Neat.Alignment.Column.column`.
values.type: List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: columnWith
values.comment:
Re-exposing of `Neat.Alignment.Column.columnWith`.

An alias for `columnWith Neat.Alignment.Column.default`.
values.type: Neat.Layout.Column.Column -> List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: fill
values.comment:
Expand the item in row/column.

Shorthands for `fillBy 1`.
values.type: Neat.Layout.Layout msg

values.name: fillBy
values.comment: Specifies how much of the remaining space in the row/column should be assigned to the item.
values.type: Basics.Int -> Neat.Layout.Layout msg

values.name: noShrink
values.comment:
Prohibit to shrink the item in row/column.

Shorthands for `fillBy 0`.
values.type: Neat.Layout.Layout msg

values.name: row
values.comment: Re-exposing of `Neat.Alignment.Row.row`.
values.type: List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: rowWith
values.comment:
Re-exposing of `Neat.Alignment.Row.rowWith`.

An alias for `rowWith Neat.Alignment.Row.default`.
values.type: Neat.Layout.Row.Row -> List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: shrinkBy
values.comment: If the size of all flex items in row/column is larger than the container, items shrink to fit according to `shrinkBy`.
values.type: Basics.Int -> Neat.Layout.Layout msg

name: Neat.Layout.Column

aliases.name: Column
aliases.type: { vertical : Neat.Layout.Column.Vertical, horizontal : Neat.Layout.Column.Horizontal, wrap : Basics.Bool, nodeName : String.String }

values.name: column
values.comment: An alias for `columnWith defaultColumn`.
values.type: List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: columnWith
values.type: Neat.Layout.Column.Column -> List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: defaultColumn
values.comment:
Default `Column` configuration.

    { vertical = Top
    , horizontal = Left
    , wrap = False
    , nodeName = "div"
    }
values.type: Neat.Layout.Column.Column

values.name: optimized
values.comment:
Optimized column.

  - First argument: identifier for each element
      - the return value must be unique among all elements

  - Second argument: apply `lazyN` on the resulting function of `toProtected`.

```
v1 : View p msg
v1 =
    Debug.todo "v1"

v2 : View p msg
v2 =
    Debug.todo "v2"

child : Int -> View p msg
child _ =
    Debug.todo "child"

-- Make sure to declare this top level in order to `lazy` works well.
child_ : Int -> Horizontal -> Html (Protected p msg)
child_ n =
    toProtected <| child n

v : List Int -> View p msg
v =
    optimized
        String.fromInt
        (\n -> lazy2 child_ n)
        defaultColumn
```
values.type: (x -> String.String) -> (x -> Neat.Layout.Column.Horizontal -> Html.Html (Neat.Protected p msg)) -> Neat.Layout.Column.Column -> List.List x -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: toProtected
values.comment:
This is supposed to be used in order to make `Html.lazy.lazyN` work.
See `optimized` for real usage.
values.type: Neat.View p a -> Neat.Layout.Column.Horizontal -> Html.Html (Neat.Protected p a)

name: Neat.Layout.Row

aliases.name: Row
aliases.type: { vertical : Neat.Layout.Row.Vertical, horizontal : Neat.Layout.Row.Horizontal, wrap : Basics.Bool, nodeName : String.String }

values.name: defaultRow
values.comment:
Default `Row` configuration.

    { vertical = Top
    , horizontal = Left
    , wrap = False
    , nodeName = "div"
    }
values.type: Neat.Layout.Row.Row

values.name: optimized
values.comment:
Optimized row.

  - First argument: identifier for each element
      - the return value must be unique among all elements

  - Second argument: apply `lazyN` on the resulting function of `toProtected`.

```
v1 : View p msg
v1 =
    Debug.todo "v1"

v2 : View p msg
v2 =
    Debug.todo "v2"

child : Int -> View p msg
child _ =
    Debug.todo "child"

-- Make sure to declare this top level in order to `lazy` works well.
child_ : Int -> Vertical -> Html (Protected p msg)
child_ n =
    toProtected <| child n

v : List Int -> View p msg
v =
    optimized
        String.fromInt
        (\n -> lazy2 child_ n)
        defaultRow
```
values.type: (x -> String.String) -> (x -> Neat.Layout.Row.Vertical -> Html.Html (Neat.Protected p msg)) -> Neat.Layout.Row.Row -> List.List x -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: row
values.comment: An alias for `rowWith defaultRow`.
values.type: List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: rowWith
values.type: Neat.Layout.Row.Row -> List.List (Neat.View p msg) -> Neat.View p msg

values.name: toProtected
values.comment:
This is supposed to be used in order to make `Html.lazy.lazyN` work.
See `optimized` for real usage.
values.type: Neat.View p a -> Neat.Layout.Row.Vertical -> Html.Html (Neat.Protected p a)
